name: GhostSubs
description: AI-powered bank CSV analyzer, enables users to detect ecurring subscriptions and flags the ones wasting your money Designed a robust CI/CD pipeline using GitHub Actions to automate containerized builds and seamlessly deploy updates to Oracle Cloud Infrastructure

name: AirPollution
description: AirPollution is a web application for visualizing and analyzing air pollution across Skopje in real time, based on data from public sensors (Pulse.eco).Deployed via GitHub Pages with automated CI/CD pipeline using GitHub Actions

name: CarRental
description: Web application that enables easy and straightforward online car rental. The application also offers owners and their administrator's easy maintenance of the cars available for rental.
